description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a weathered, light gray surface, standing on a multi-tiered square base. The obelisk features a plaque with Cyrillic text and a star emblem on one face, indicating it may serve as a memorial or monument. The stone shows signs of aging, with visible cracks and discoloration, and some faint graffiti or markings on its sides. The base consists of two distinct steps, each slightly offset, and is set on a square patch of ground that appears to be a mix of dirt and sparse grass. The overall structure is solid and imposing, with clean, straight lines and minimal decorative elements. The surrounding area is open, with no immediate barriers or additional objects except for the ground platform.
description: A tall, weathered stone obelisk with a square, tiered base and a commemorative plaque, set on a patch of dirt and grass.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from the side, showing the plain stone surface and the layered square base, with some grass and dirt visible around the foundation.
description_view_1: This view highlights another plain side of the obelisk, with faint markings and the multi-tiered base clearly visible.
description_view_2: The obelisk's side is shown with visible graffiti or etching, and the shadowed base stands out against the ground.
description_view_3: The front face features a plaque with Cyrillic text and a star emblem, making this the most detailed and informative side of the obelisk.
attribute_inscription: A metal plaque with Cyrillic text and a star emblem is affixed to the upper section of one face; the text is legible and the style is formal, typical of memorials.
attribute_ornamentation: A star emblem is present on the plaque; otherwise, no additional ornamentation or decorative carvings are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a two-tiered square platform made of the same stone as the obelisk, with each tier slightly offset and the lower tier larger, providing stability and a stepped appearance.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and squared off, matching the rectangular geometry of the obelisk, with no unique features or decorations.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a square patch of ground with sparse grass and dirt; no fences, statues, or additional objects are immediately present.
